channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Quality of Life & PROs
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Quality of Life & PROs

item.title: Ferulic acid - A promising candidate molecule for the treatment of colitis.
item.description: European journal of microbiology & immunology - Review - Ulcerative colitis is an inflammatory bowel disease of multi-factorial etiology and responsible for considerable health and socioeconomic burdens given high global prevalence rates. Since current t...

item.title: Spatiotemporally optimized heterotopic transplantation of early-stage small intestinal organoids ameliorates murine ulcerative colitis.
item.description: International immunopharmacology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease where achieving durable mucosal healing remains a critical clinical challenge. While intestinal organoids hold promise for UC repair,...

item.title: Gastrointestinal Klippel-Trénaunay Syndrome Mimicking Ulcerative Colitis: A Case Report.
item.description: Case reports in medicine - Klippel-Trénaunay syndrome (KTS) is a rare congenital syndrome characterized by the triad of capillary malformation, varicosities, and limb hypertrophy, with an incidence of 2-5 per 100,000. Gastro...

item.title: Exploratory evaluation of candidate metabolites identified in Clonorchis sinensis preparations in psoriasis-like inflammatory models.
item.description: Parasites, hosts and diseases - Psoriasis is a chronic inflammatory seronegative disease closely associated with ankylosing spondylitis and inflammatory bowel disease. This study aimed to investigate the anti-inflammatory effects...

item.title: Colon-targeting pH-responsive Bletilla striata polysaccharide coacervate microdroplets for ulcerative colitis therapy via macrophage reprogramming.
item.description: Journal of nanobiotechnology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is an immune-mediated chronic inflammatory bowel disease that severely impairs patients' quality of life. Efficient oral colon-targeted delivery systems are urgently needed ...

item.title: Evaluating the quality and reliability of inflammatory bowel disease-related short videos on BiliBili and TikTok: A cross-sectional study.
item.description: Health informatics journal - BackgroundInflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) is a chronic condition with increasing global prevalence. Short-video platforms like TikTok and Bilibili are popular health information sources, but their...

item.title: Extraintestinal manifestations have a negative impact on Quality of Life of patients with Inflammatory Bowel Disease.
item.description: Digestion - Inflammatory Bowel Diseases (IBD) can produce extraintestinal manifestations (EIMs) in up to 50% of patients with IBD and may have worse quality of life than the general population. In general, IBD...

item.title: TAAR Immunopharmacology.
item.description: Handbook of experimental pharmacology - Trace amine-associated receptors (TAARs) were originally identified as G protein-coupled receptors involved in monoaminergic signaling within the central nervous system. However, accumulating evide...

item.title: Assessment of kinesiophobia in ulcerative colitis: a case-control study highlighting functional and psychological implications.
item.description: Revista da Associacao Medica Brasileira (1992) - Idiopathic colitis is a chronic disorder, and the pain, fatigue, and anxiety associated with this condition may promote the evolution of kinesiophobia, a fear of movement that limits physical activ...

item.title: The shifting burden of early-onset inflammatory bowel disease: a global analysis.
item.description: Pediatric research - Early-onset inflammatory bowel disease (EO-IBD), affecting children under age 10 years, has an emerged as a distinct global pediatric health concern with increasing clinical and epidemiological fea...

item.title: Hierarchical correlates of sexual dysfunction in inflammatory bowel disease: Psychological burden outweighs disease activity and sarcopenia.
item.description: Journal of psychosomatic research - Sexual dysfunction (SD) is a common but underrecognized complication of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), arising from a complex interplay of biological, psychological, and social factors. Their re...

item.title: The PANACEA Project: a multinational model for digital health literacy in inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Crohn's & colitis 360 - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) represents an increasing public health challenge in Latin America, where structural inequities and limited access to standardized education contribute to gaps in he...
